name: Tyrannosaurus rex
title: Tyrannosaurus rex
description: One of the largest land predators ever; up to 12 m long with bone-crushing bite force.

name: Velociraptor mongoliensis
title: Velociraptor mongoliensis
description: Turkey-sized feathered predator with a large sickle claw on each foot.

name: Triceratops horridus
title: Triceratops horridus
description: Three-horned herbivore with a massive bony frill.

name: Stegosaurus stenops
title: Stegosaurus stenops
description: Plated herbivore with a spiked tail (thagomizer).

name: Allosaurus fragilis
title: Allosaurus fragilis
description: Apex Jurassic predator of the Morrison Formation.

name: Brachiosaurus altithorax
title: Brachiosaurus altithorax
description: Long-necked giant that browsed high foliage.

name: Diplodocus longus
title: Diplodocus longus
description: Extremely long sauropod with a whip-like tail.

name: Spinosaurus aegyptiacus
title: Spinosaurus aegyptiacus
description: Sail-backed semi-aquatic predator, possibly the longest theropod.

name: Coelophysis bauri
title: Coelophysis bauri
description: Slender early theropod found in huge bonebeds.

name: Plateosaurus trossingensis
title: Plateosaurus trossingensis
description: Early long-necked plant-eater of the Late Triassic.

name: Herrerasaurus ischigualastensis
title: Herrerasaurus ischigualastensis
description: One of the earliest known dinosaurs.

name: Iguanodon bernissartensis
title: Iguanodon bernissartensis
description: Herbivore with a distinctive thumb spike.

name: Ankylosaurus magniventris
title: Ankylosaurus magniventris
description: Armoured herbivore with a bony tail club.

name: Archaeopteryx lithographica
title: Archaeopteryx lithographica
description: Feathered transitional form between dinosaurs and birds.

name: Carnotaurus sastrei
title: Carnotaurus sastrei
description: Horned predator with tiny arms and a lightweight skull.
